name: Code Llama 70B
archDisplay: Dense transformer decoder (Llama 2 base), trained on 1T tokens of code
note: Largest Code Llama base model, released Jan 2024, trained on 1 trillion tokens of code (vs 500B for the 7B/13B/34B family).
tpsNote: 70B at Q4 (~40GB) exceeds the 4090's 24GB VRAM and requires partial CPU-layer offload; ~18 tok/s reported with most layers on GPU, dropping to 8-15 tok/s under heavier offload.
